title: Bide A Wee!
content:
Though the times be dark and dreary,
    Though the way be long,
    Keep your spirits bright and cheery,--
    --"Bide a wee, and dinna weary!"
    Is a heartsome song.
meaning:
This evocative piece by William Arthur Dunkerley (John Oxenham), titled "Bide A Wee!", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
